title: carya tomentosa
intro: Carya tomentosa, also known as the Shellbark Hickory, is a deciduous tree species native to eastern North America. The Shellbark Hickory has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Carya tomentosa include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and aiding in the relief of respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of the Shellbark Hickory can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
